free_text: Single- and multi-nucleon transfer reactions induced
by oxygen ions on boron 10 and 11
Department of Physics
Charge of incident ion is +4.
[EN-RSL] 1 parts in 1.0E+03
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target is self supported.
- Solid angle of detector is 3.0 msr.
- Efficiency: The coincidence efficiency was 100%
One detector, the defining counter, is
placed at the desired angle and the second
counter, the conjugate counter, is set at
the correct angle to detect recoiling
particle.
the over-all accuracy
target thickness determination
solid angle
charge collection
Error bars indicate the experimental random
errors due to statistics, background
subtraction, particle-group separation and
counting loss.
